Issue: Detect representational collapse in medical imaging embeddings
Decision: Add EmbeddingCollapseMetric class for detecting representational collapse in embedding spaces
Rationale: Follows FIDMetric/MMDMetric pattern: inherits Metric, tensor-in/tensor-out, torch-only core. Validated on pathology embeddings. Computes five indicators (centroid_similarity, effective_rank_score, per_class_rank, domain_shift, separation) to detect collapse in embedding spaces where class centroids converge, effective dimensionality drops, or domains become indistinguishable.
Author: ekansh-arora0
Description: monai/metrics/embedding_collapse.py module, including EmbeddingCollapseMetric class, compute_embedding_collapse function, and linear_probe_accuracy helper. Tests in tests/test_embedding_collapse.py.
